name: Wedding Lite
title: Wedding Lite - Free Bootstrap 5 HTML Template
description: Wedding invitation with Bootstrap 5. Heart icon preloader. Navbar with couple names and heart icon. Hero with invitation text and Save the Date card. Love Story with bride/groom photos and social links. Wedding details timeline. Wedding party members. Gallery with Magnific Popup. RSVP form. Contact form with Google Maps. Amatic SC and Playfair Display fonts.

typography.style: Decorative Amatic SC with elegant Playfair Display

layoutDetails: Single-page with navbar. Hero with save-the-date. Bride/groom profiles. Event timeline. Gallery. RSVP form. Contact with map.
visualStyle: Elegant romantic wedding with pink accent, decorative fonts, heart icons. Photo gallery with lightbox.
